user.title: HA AI Companion
user.description: Set up your HA AI Companion to manage Home Assistant configuration files through natural language.

data.system_prompt_file: System Prompt File (optional, path relative to /config)
data.suggestion_prompt: Custom Suggestion Instructions (optional, appended to prompt)
data.nodered_token: Node-RED API Token (optional, if auth is enabled)
data.nodered_flows_file: Node-RED Flows File fallback (optional, relative to /config)
data.input_price_per_1m: Input price per 1M tokens in USD (optional, enables cost display)
data.output_price_per_1m: Output price per 1M tokens in USD (optional)
data.max_tokens: Max output tokens — all phases (optional, 0 = model default)
data.suggestion_max_tokens: Max output tokens — suggestion phase (optional override)
data.config_max_tokens: Max output tokens — config phase (optional override)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the API. Please check your API key and URL.

abort.already_configured: HA AI Companion is already configured.

init.title: Core Model Settings
init.description: Step 1 of 3 — Configure the main API endpoint and model. Proceed to configure the suggestion and config phase overrides.

data.input_price_per_1m: Input price per 1M tokens in USD (0 = disabled)
data.output_price_per_1m: Output price per 1M tokens in USD

suggestion_phase.title: Suggestion & Config Phase
suggestion_phase.description: Step 2 of 3 — Override model/API for the suggestion phase (generating automation ideas) and the config phase (editing YAML). Leave blank to use the main model.

data.suggestion_model: Suggestion Phase Model (blank = use main model)
data.suggestion_api_url: Suggestion Phase API URL (blank = use main URL)
data.suggestion_api_key: Suggestion Phase API Key (blank = use main key)
data.suggestion_max_tokens: Suggestion Phase Max Tokens (0 = model default)
data.config_model: Config Phase Model (blank = use main model)
data.config_api_url: Config Phase API URL (blank = use main URL)
data.config_api_key: Config Phase API Key (blank = use main key)
data.config_max_tokens: Config Phase Max Tokens (0 = model default)

advanced.title: Node-RED & Advanced
advanced.description: Step 3 of 3 — Node-RED integration and advanced settings.

data.nodered_token: Node-RED API Token (leave blank if auth disabled)
